title: Bridge Essay: Altered Self-Referential-Related Brain Regions in Depersonalization-Derealization Disorder.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Emptiness** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Emptiness — dissolution of self, DMN decoupling, ego dissolution, nondual awareness.
**Phase context:** Self-dissolution — ego dissolution, DMN decoupling, non-self in neuroscience.

**Altered Self-Referential-Related Brain Regions in Depersonalization-Derealization Disorder.** — Brain Behav (2025). DOI: 10.1002/brb3.70314. PMID: 39935045. OBJECTIVE: We aimed to explore the alteration in topology and network properties in self-referential-related brain regions of individuals with depersonalization-derealization disorders (DPD), using evidence from resting-state functional magnetic resonance imaging (rs-fMRI).
